questions: Who is most likely to be the first person to complain about the car, the temperature, the drive, or say that you all should have just flown?
Who is most likely to be the reason you're late to literally everything?

Who is most likely to get sentimental and cry?
Who is most likely to be the first person to lose their phone or wallet?
Who is most likely to yak on the first night?

Who is most likely to be the first person to fall asleep on Friday night?
Who is most likely to end up on the double bed or sofa bed?
Who is most likely to get the bachelor trip's best group photo?
Who is most likely to get kicked out of a bar?
Who is least likely to take their shirt off?
Who is most likely to be the last person to fall asleep on Friday night?
Who is most likely to disappear for two hours and come back like nothing happened?
Who is most likely to try speaking French and completely butcher it?
Who is most likely to order a huge poutine and not come close to finishing it?

Who is most likely to say "one more" 6 times in a row?
